nasb.text: and her husband heard it, but said nothing to her and did not forbid her, then all her vows shall stand and every obligation by which she bound herself shall stand.

esv.text: and her husband heard of it and said nothing to her and did not oppose her, then all her vows shall stand, and every pledge by which she bound herself shall stand.

cnv.text: 她丈夫聽見了，卻默不作聲，也沒有阻止她，她所許的願和所說一切約束自己的話，就為有效。

ccb.text: 她丈夫得知后没有反对，她就必须履行诺言；
